title: Quick search [strg+b] -> open in new tab | Not working anymore
excerpt:
Hey

posts.author: RaoulVega (R. Vega)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey

i’m using the quick search all the time. Primarily opening new boards in new tabs. Since today, i can’t open boards in new tabs out of the quick search anymore. I can only click on the quick search result and open the chosen board in the same tab.

Is it just me experiencing this?

This is really slowing down, if one works on multiple boards at the same time…

posts.author: Sarah (SarahD)
posts.cookedHtml: I was also frustrated by this sudden change as I’m used to middle clicking for new tab in search (and the rest of the web). When looking for answers I re-read the Quick Search feature page. There’s a tiny bit at text at the bottom that says "Quick Search links can be opened in a new tab by clicking on the name, while holding the ⌘ Command/Windows key. No need to duplicate tabs! " So I guess that’s my workaround for now, but I agree we need “middle click new tab” back.
